weekly_brief_draft: Governance momentum remains stalled this week with no frontier capability leaps, safety incidents, or regulatory milestones reported in provided documents. EU AI Act standards vacuum persists ahead of August 2026 high-risk obligations, while enterprise AI maturity lags per Digitopia 2026 report showing global DAIMI average 2.93 and AI maturity at 2.38 despite rapid capability advances. US DAIMI at 2.99 trails APAC adoption cycles highlighting reality gap beyond Silicon Valley pilots. Capability tier tracker flags T3 enterprise developments with medium risk from execution chasm in commercial scaling. No T1 frontier model releases or T2 advanced capability jumps noted; benchmark saturation discourse continues but lacks acute signals. Regulatory tracker confirms EU AI Act in force status with ongoing CEN-CENELEC drafts failing to close compliance gap. AI-FIMI layer silent with no observed capabilities in information operations. Autonomous systems and critical infrastructure show no new military AI or sector governance shifts. Key judgment centers on widening deployment maturity gap risking obsolescence of current frameworks for scaling AI beyond labs. Cross-monitor candidates minimal given null signals. Overall snapshot indicates amber frontier safety amid stable US-China policy gap.

cross_monitor_candidates.signal: EU AI Act standards vacuum risks tech sovereignty in high-risk compliance
